repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Male model pornography magazines, mainly single issues
did.abstract: Pornography magazines featuring men, mostly the first and only volumes of a title.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

defitem.label: EAD encoding:
defitem.item: Andrea Hektor, April 2004Elyse FinkelSara McDermott, June 2009

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Male model pornography magazines, mainly single issues, #7633. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Pornography magazines featuring men, mostly the first and only volumes of a title. Most show male models with other male models, directed at a gay male audience. Many focus on racial features of the models, including Black men and interracial sex. A few magazines present male models as for a heterosexual female audience.

controlaccess.subject: Sex in mass media.
African American men -- Pictorial works -- Periodicals.
Gay men -- Pictorial works -- Periodicals.
Pornography -- Periodicals.

unittitle.title: The Art Of Pierced Penises and Decorative Tattoos (Fetish)
Devices For Masturbation And Sex Play
Masturbation & the Phallus: A Photo Study of the Penis
One Size Fits All Part II
Phallic Development in the Young Adult
A Sociable Feast: A Very Hot Day Part 2
